misconfig_patterns: default user with empty password in default deployment
GET /?query=SELECT+1 returns Ok. without any credentials
Vector indexes (annoy/usearch, ClickHouse 23.5+) detectable via SHOW CREATE TABLE
5,208 confirmed instances in prior NuClide survey

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must be exactly Ok.\n — uniquely identifies ClickHouse HTTP interface

deployment_tells: GET / returns Ok. (literal) without auth — unique to ClickHouse HTTP interface
SHOW CREATE TABLE {t} exposes annoy() or usearch() vector index DDL
pivot_paths: GET /?query=SELECT+*+FROM+system.tables → all tables across all databases
GET /?query=SHOW+CREATE+TABLE+{t} → detect annoy/usearch vector index DDL
